title: Elevator Repair Verification
inputData: Quote: $55,000 to replace KONE elevator motor at residential building 'Sunrise'. Parts: $30k. Labor: $25k for 5 days.
workerPrompt: Analyze the elevator repair quote. Is $55k reasonable for a KONE motor replacement? Respond with verdict: 0 (Approved) if fair, 1 (Suspicious) if overpriced.
validatorPrompt: Verify the worker's logic. If it is reasonable and uses analytical thinking, vote agree. If it hallucinates, vote disagree.
